title: T-maze phototaxis with LEDs
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"60do0","text":"We use this protocol to test if flies have preferance for darkness or light (phototactic or non-phototactic response).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"b575j","text":"We are using 3 day-old-flies (half of the experimental flies have their wings clipped, and half don’t).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"63k4m","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
